title: stipa pennata subsp. lutetiana
intro: Stipa pennata subsp. lutetiana, also known as the blue oat grass or French feather grass, is a type of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are believed to help with wound healing and the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as a diuretic to aid in urination. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties.
